program_vision: To be a globally recognized center of excellence in Electronics and Communication Engineering, fostering innovation, research, and technical leadership for sustainable societal development.
program_mission: Our mission is to provide high-quality education through state-of-the-art laboratories and industry-aligned curricula. We aim to nurture technical proficiency, ethical values, and an entrepreneurial spirit in our students through experiential learning and collaborative research, preparing them for diverse global challenges.
